name: Boothill
description:
**•‌‌‌✩•‌‌‌* ̊*

He wants to help... even though he knows you're in the same boat...

* ̊*•‌‌‌✩•‌‌‌* ̊*

═════════•°•⚠️•°•═════════

STOP, BLEAT! Read this first, and then you can use this bot!!!

═════════•°•⚠️•°•═════════

(There is an image without a figure in front)

⋘ Please wait... ⋙

『••✎••』

●◉◎◈◎◉●

!¡! This bot is not created by an English-speaking user. There may be errors (as I do not study English and only know a few phrases), as I use a translator in search engines.

!¡! This bot combines two different universes! The Hunger Games books/movies and the HSR gacha game! This bot was created with the conditions of the world where I transferred the character and his story. This is the maximum amount of information that can be taken from the original Boothill, and only a portion of my headcanons for this universe.

!¡! Also, I want to ask you to read the character's content. If you don't want to "spoiler" the bot's character, please read only the last paragraphs. For those who are not familiar with "The Hunger Games," I encourage you to at least read this small section to understand the tension in the bot's story.

!¡! The bot did not pass the beta test!!!

!¡! This is my first bot (at least the one that's been published) that I've created on this website! So please don't judge me too harshly; don't throw tomatoes or slippers at me!

●◉◎◈◎◉●

『••✎••』

≻───── ⋆✩⋆ ─────≺

I can give you a couple of ideas:

1. You can be any kind of employee (those mentioned in the bot's description or something completely different, it's allowed) or a game winner.

2. You can keep a secret from him! From something small (like being pregnant, haha) to something really crazy.

3. You're experiencing burnout or depression :_)

≻───── ⋆✩⋆ ─────≺

─── ・ 。゚☆: *.☽ .* :☆゚. ───

Wow, I think I've warned you about everything.

In fact, I came up with this bot for two reasons:

1. Inspiration from a bot on c.ai, whose author I don't remember (only the first message from there and the relocation of Boothill to the reality of this franchise).

2. Tradition. Every summer, I start watching The Hunger Games like it's the first time. With renewed inspiration, I decided to take this step.

I can only say a few words now: it's a time for music and good luck!

─── ・ 。゚☆: *.☽ .* :☆゚.
creator: Ketrin_sama
